import React from "react"; import { FontAwesomeIcon } from "@fortawesome/react-fontawesome"; import DessertLogo from '../assets/Dessert.png'; import { Link } from "react-router-dom/cjs/react-router-dom"; const Nav = ({ cart}) => { function openMenu () { document.body.classList += " menu--open"; } function closeMenu () { document.body.classList.remove("menu--open") } return (
  • Home
  • Desserts
  • {cart.length}
  • Home
  • Desserts
  • Cart
); }; export default Nav;
